name: Reference
description: This is a reference for the objects below, not a variant. Each field is an example or description of its content.
location: The line range where the component is located (e.g. #L10-L20 means the component is between line 10 and 20). The range may not be exact, so leave a margin of error.

name: Split with image
description: Feature section with split feature layout pairing text content with a visual panel.

name: Product storytelling
description: Feature section with narrative product section with sequential value messaging.

name: Feature composition
description: Feature section with composed multi-block feature arrangement for mixed content types.

name: Visual Performance Highlight
description: Feature section with performance-focused block with visual KPI emphasis.

name: Interactive tabbed showcase
description: Feature section with tabbed interaction that swaps feature content panels.

name: Visual hotspots showcase
description: Feature section with image hotspot interactions that reveal contextual feature details.
